pluginMechanism: context routing and sandboxed tool output

args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts

- Main exports or names: Factory class, createFactory, createMiddleware, CreateHandlersInterface
- Reads as: TypeScript module with type definitions and factory class (367 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/types/index.ts
- Safe summary: Factory helper provides app factory functions for creating Hono apps with custom initApp and default options; createHandlers returns arrays of 1-10 handlers with intersected env types.

## src/helper/route/index.ts

- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: Route inspection utilities using Context (142 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/context.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/types/index.ts, src/utils/url.ts
- Safe summary: Route helper exports functions to get matched routes and path information from context; basePath uses WeakMap caching for performance.

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts

- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSMessageReceive
- Reads as: WebSocket upgrade helper (141 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/context.ts, src/types/index.ts
- Safe summary: WebSocket helper provides defineWebSocketHelper for upgrading connections and WSContext class for controlling WebSockets with events onOpen/onMessage/onClose/onError.

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts

- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie
- Reads as: Cookie management helpers (146 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/utils/cookie.ts
- Safe summary: Cookie helper exports functions to get/set/delete signed and unsigned cookies; supports __Secure- and __Host- prefixes with proper attribute handling.

## src/helper/testing/index.ts

- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: Testing client generator (28 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/client/index.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/hono.ts
- Safe summary: Testing helper provides testClient function to create a typed HTTP client from a Hono app with custom fetch implementation.

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts

- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
- Reads as: Runtime detection utilities (91 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/context.ts
- Safe summary: Adapter helper exports env function to access runtime-specific bindings; getRuntimeKey detects Node/Deno/Bun/Workerd/Fastly/Edge-Light from userAgent or globals.

## src/helper/css/index.ts

- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
- Reads as: CSS-in-JS helper (253 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.ts, src/jsx/constants.ts, src/jsx/dom/css.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts
- Safe summary: CSS helper provides experimental css/cx/keyframes/viewTransition/Style functions; uses createCssContext to manage class names and inject styles via id-based <style> element.

## src/helper/css/common.ts

- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, minify, toHash, ClassNameSlug, OnInvalidSlug, constants (symbols)
- Reads as: CSS utilities and shared functions (329 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
- Safe summary: CSS common exports template tag functions for building styles; includes minify regex, hash generation for class names, slug customization support, and CSS-wide reserved name checking.

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts

- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: Proxy fetch API wrapper (191 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/http-exception.ts, src/utils/headers.ts
- Safe summary: Proxy helper exports proxy function that forwards requests with hop-by-hop header removal; supports strictConnectionProcessing for RFC 9110 compliance.

## src/helper/dev/index.ts

- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
- Reads as: Development utilities for route inspection (80 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/hono.ts, src/types/index.ts, src/utils/color.ts, src/utils/handler.ts
- Safe summary: Dev helper exports inspectRoutes to collect route data and showRoutes to print formatted route listings with optional colorization.

## src/helper/html/index.ts

- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: HTML rendering utilities (58 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/utils/html.ts
- Safe summary: HTML helper exports html template tag function that escapes values and resolves callbacks; re-exports raw for unescaped strings.

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts

- Main exports or names: ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, toSSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin, isSSGContext, disableSSG
- Reads as: SSG (Static Site Generation) module index (15 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
- Safe summary: SSG helper index exports ssgParams middleware for dynamic routes, onlySSG/disableSSG middleware, and toSSG function for static site generation.

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts

- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, SSGPlugin, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, ToSSGOptions, defaultExtensionMap
- Reads as: Core SSG generation logic (471 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/utils/concurrent.ts, src/utils/mime.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
- Safe summary: SSG core exports toSSG function that fetches route content with concurrency, saves to files via FileSystemModule; supports plugins and hooks beforeRequestHook/afterResponseHook/afterGenerateHook.

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts

- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: SSG utility functions (88 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/router/index.ts, src/utils/handler.ts
- Safe summary: SSG utils exports path utilities and route filtering; filterStaticGenerateRoutes finds GET/all method non-middleware handlers; isDynamicRoute checks for :param or * patterns.

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts

- Main exports or names: ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, isSSGContext, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, SSGParams, SSGParam
- Reads as: SSG middleware (84 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/context.ts
- Safe summary: SSG middleware exports ssgParams for adding params to dynamic routes, isSSGContext check, and disableSSG/onlySSG to guard handlers for static generation.

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts

- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
- Reads as: Streaming helper index (10 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Safe summary: Streaming index exports stream function, streamSSE for Server-Sent Events, and streamText for plain text streaming.

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts

- Main exports or names: stream, contextStash
- Reads as: Base streaming API wrapper (46 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/context.ts, src/utils/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Safe summary: Base stream helper exports stream function that uses TransformStream for chunked responses; handles Bun v1.1.27 compatibility with request abort signals.

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts

- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
- Reads as: SSE streaming implementation (101 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/context.ts, src/utils/html.ts, src/utils/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Safe summary: SSE helper exports streamSSE with SSEStreamingApi class; formats data as Server-Sent Events with event/id/retry fields and chunked content type.

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts

- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: Text streaming wrapper (16 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/context.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Safe summary: Text streaming helper exports streamText function that sets Content-Type to text/plain with X-Content-Type-Options nosniff header.

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts

- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: Accepts helper index (7 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Safe summary: Accepts index exports accepts function for matching Accept headers.

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts

- Main exports or names: accepts, defaultMatch, Accept, acceptsConfig, acceptsOptions
- Reads as: Accept header matching (50 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/context.ts, src/utils/accept.ts, src/utils/headers.ts
- Safe summary: Accepts helper exports accepts function that parses Accept headers and matches against supported types with quality value sorting; returns default if no match.

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts

- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, GetConnInfo, AddressType, NetAddrInfo
- Reads as: Connection info type exports (7 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Safe summary: Conninfo index exports connection information types including remote address, port, transport, and address type.

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts

- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, GetConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType
- Reads as: Connection info type definitions (46 lines)
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Safe summary: Conninfo types exports ConnInfo interface with remote field containing NetAddrInfo with address/port/transport/addressType properties.
